ism, insanity or diarrhoea.
Leo It is due to boils (tumour), poison, weapons, fever etc.
Virgo : — It is through stomach-complaints, diseases of the
private parts, quarrel, fall from a precipice etc.
Libra : — It is caused by aberration of the mind, fever or
typhoid.
Scorpio : — Through jaundice, diarrhoea, enlargement of (he
spleen and the like.
Sagittarius Through a tree, water, weapon or wooden
piece. (The effect is sure if the concerned Sign or Amsa is occu-
pied by a malefic).
Capricorn It is by impalement, ploughing or mental
derangement. If there is a malefic in the Sign or Amsa, death

224 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
is likely through wild animals like tigers, cough, tever,
consumption or some unnatural cause.
Aquarius If it is occupied by malefics, death is likely through
tigers, weapons, serpents, cough, fever or consumption.
Pisces It may be due to snake-poison, exhaustion of a
journey, storm, machine, ship-wreck or fall of lightning.
